## Summary

Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Related Issue

Fixes #<!-- issue number — file an issue before large PRs (see CONTRIBUTING.md) -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Bundle size is within 500 KB budget (`pnpm check:bundle-size`)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies added
- [ ] No VS Code proposed APIs or `(vscode as any).*` casts used
- [ ] Follows Conventional Commits format
- [ ] Files over 200 lines are split along natural boundaries

## Screenshots / GIFs

If applicable, add screenshots or GIFs to demonstrate the change.
